entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A climate-resilient legume nutritionally rich and valuable in Asia, Africa, and Caribbean regions to alleviate malnutrition

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown to alleviate malnutrition

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown to alleviate malnutrition and where germplasms showed high nutrient density

entities.name: CARIBBEAN
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown to alleviate malnutrition

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition that pigeonpea helps to alleviate

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of improving the nutritional quality of food crops

entities.name: RS PARODA GENEBANK
entities.description: A facility in India where 600 pigeonpea germplasms are conserved

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization managing the RS Paroda Genebank

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the RS Paroda Genebank and ICRISAT are located

entities.name: AUGMENTED DESIGN
entities.description: The field trial design used to assess agronomic traits and grain nutrients

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the time to reach 50% flowering

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the time to reach maturity

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the total grain yield per plant

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A grain nutrient measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A grain nutrient (P) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A grain nutrient (K) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Ca) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Mg) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Fe) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Zn) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: MANGANESE
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Mn) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: COPPER
entities.description: A grain nutrient (Cu) measured in pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environment affecting nutrient accumulation

entities.name: WARD.D2 CLUSTERING ALGORITHM
entities.description: A clustering method used to group pigeonpea germplasms

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Ecological environments that biofortified pigeonpea lines are intended to fit

entities.name: SNP/HAPLOTYPE-BASED GWAS
entities.description: A genome-wide association study method used to identify genetic variants

entities.name: GENETIC VARIANTS
entities.description: Genetic markers identified via GWAS to accelerate genetic gains in nutrient improvement

entities.name: GRAIN NUTRIENT VARIABILITY
entities.description: The range of nutrient levels observed across the pigeonpea genebank collection

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DATA
entities.description: The large set of observable traits generated during the study
